title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Operations Brief: Net Dhcp Scopes Options
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dhcp scopes options increment in a validated core network-services design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure DHCP scopes, leases, reservations, exclusions, gateways, DNS options, and pool capacity.
Monitor temperature and humidity and select compatible detection, suppression, water, dust, and contamination controls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
